notes: The CP4N is the networked variant of the CP4 (adds dedicated Control Subnet port). All control I/O uses 3.5mm euroblock detachable terminal blocks. Ethernet rated 100/1000Base-TX on both LAN and Control Subnet ports. Power is external DC adapter (PW-2420RU included), not mains inlet on the unit itself. SD/SDHC memory card slot also present but is not a signal or power connector. Spec confirmed from Crestron official documentation.

ports.name: COM 1
ports.note: 5-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; RS-232/422/485 up to 115.2k baud

ports.name: COM 2
ports.note: 3-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; RS-232 up to 115.2k baud

ports.name: COM 3
ports.note: 3-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; RS-232 up to 115.2k baud

ports.name: IR/Serial Output 1–8
ports.note: Two 8-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal blocks; IR up to 1.2 MHz or TTL/RS-232 up to 115.2k baud

ports.name: Relay Output 1–8
ports.note: Two 8-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal blocks; normally open isolated relays, 1A at 30VAC/VDC

ports.name: I/O 1–8
ports.note: One 9-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; Versiport configurable digital input/output or 0–10V analog input

ports.name: NET
ports.note: 4-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; Cresnet master/input port

ports.name: USB
ports.note: Rear panel; USB 2.0 Type-A host for mass storage devices

ports.name: USB
ports.note: Front panel; USB 2.0 Type-B console port for computer setup

ports.name: 24VDC
ports.note: 2.1x5.5mm DC barrel connector; 24VDC 2.0A; PW-2420RU power pack included
